text: Ship: LAI. Class: FRIGATE. Standard light frigate. Solo capable. Jump-equipped. Mid signature. Hull integrity 2,100 HP. Cargo capacity 1,040 m³. Fuel capacity 2,400 units. Mass 18,929,160 kg. Volume 31,900 m³. Inertia modifier 0.20x. Capacitor 40.0 GJ. Max velocity 440 m/s. Warp speed 2.99 kc. Signature radius 75 m. Targeting range 100 km. Scan resolution 295 mm. Visual signature: compact angular silhouette, swept fins, dark orange tint.

Ship: LORHA. Class: FRIGATE. Industrial frigate variant. ~6× LAI cargo capacity. Slow turning. Logistics role. Hull integrity 2,155 HP. Cargo capacity 6,240 m³. Fuel capacity 2,508 units. Mass 31,369,320 kg. Volume 43,400 m³. Inertia modifier 0.30x. Capacitor 30.0 GJ. Max velocity 450 m/s. Warp speed 2.99 kc. Signature radius 70 m. Targeting range 100 km. Scan resolution 295 mm. Visual signature: angular frigate with forward-swept wings, dark orange background.

Ship: HAF. Class: FRIGATE. Heavy assault frigate. Largest mass in the frigate class. Higher capacitor. Hull integrity 2,650 HP. Cargo capacity 3,120 m³. Fuel capacity 4,184 units. Mass 81,883,000 kg. Volume 96,332 m³. Inertia modifier 0.25x. Capacitor 50.0 GJ. Max velocity 440 m/s. Warp speed 2.99 kc. Signature radius 65 m. Targeting range 100 km. Scan resolution 295 mm. Visual signature: bulky angular frigate with large forward hull section.

Ship: CAROM. Class: CORVETTE. Lightweight corvette. Low fuel cost. Restricted slot layout. Hull integrity 1,300 HP. Cargo capacity 300 m³. Fuel capacity 3,000 units. Mass 7,200,000 kg. Volume 12,000 m³. Inertia modifier 0.45x. Capacitor 50.0 GJ. Max velocity 270 m/s. Warp speed 1.50 kc. Signature radius 50 m. Targeting range 100 km. Scan resolution 500 mm. Visual signature: small boxy corvette silhouette, dark reddish-orange smoky bg.

Ship: MAUL. Class: CRUISER. Heavy cruiser. Largest combat hull commonly fielded. High mass — slow to align. Hull integrity 4,400 HP. Cargo capacity 20,800 m³. Fuel capacity 24,160 units. Mass 548,435,920 kg. Volume 743,900 m³. Inertia modifier 0.04x. Capacitor 80.0 GJ. Max velocity 400 m/s. Warp speed 2.50 kc. Signature radius 290 m. Targeting range 100 km. Scan resolution 250 mm. Visual signature: large angular cruiser with swept wings, light grey/white.

Ship: TADES. Class: DESTROYER. Destroyer hull. Mid-tier engagement profile. Higher warp speed than larger ships. Hull integrity 2,600 HP. Cargo capacity 3,120 m³. Fuel capacity 5,972 units. Mass 74,655,480 kg. Volume 104,100 m³. Inertia modifier 0.15x. Capacitor 65.0 GJ. Max velocity 420 m/s. Warp speed 3.24 kc. Signature radius 130 m. Targeting range 100 km. Scan resolution 275 mm. Visual signature: destroyer with elongated angular white/grey hull, multiple protruding components.

Ship: RECURVE. Class: CORVETTE. Mining/utility corvette. Low fuel capacity. Short engagement endurance. Hull integrity 1,650 HP. Cargo capacity 520 m³. Fuel capacity 970 units. Mass 10,400,000 kg. Volume 16,000 m³. Inertia modifier 0.20x. Capacitor 50.0 GJ. Max velocity 405 m/s. Warp speed 1.50 kc. Signature radius 60 m. Targeting range 100 km. Scan resolution 500 mm. Visual signature: small corvette with flat wide rectangular boxy hull, dark grey/green.

Ship: REIVER. Class: CORVETTE. Combat corvette variant. Higher inertia modifier — turns sharper than fleet corvettes. Hull integrity 1,900 HP. Cargo capacity 520 m³. Fuel capacity 1,416 units. Mass 10,200,000 kg. Volume 12,000 m³. Inertia modifier 0.40x. Capacitor 50.0 GJ. Max velocity 435 m/s. Warp speed 1.50 kc. Signature radius 50 m. Targeting range 100 km. Scan resolution 500 mm. Visual signature: small corvette with compact rounded dark hull, angular features.

Ship: WEND. Class: SHUTTLE. Civilian shuttle. Minimal mass. No combat role. Personal transit only. Hull integrity 750 HP. Cargo capacity 520 m³. Fuel capacity 200 units. Mass 6,800,000 kg. Volume 4,000 m³. Inertia modifier 0.46x. Capacitor 32.0 GJ. Max velocity 260 m/s. Warp speed 1.50 kc. Signature radius 30 m. Targeting range 100 km. Scan resolution 500 mm. Visual signature: small angular shuttle with reddish-orange hull.

Ship: USV. Class: FRIGATE. Industrial frigate (USV). Mid cargo capacity. Slow sublight velocity. Hull integrity 2,160 HP. Cargo capacity 3,120 m³. Fuel capacity 2,420 units. Mass 30,266,600 kg. Volume 40,600 m³. Inertia modifier 0.20x. Capacitor 45.0 GJ. Max velocity 280 m/s. Warp speed 2.99 kc. Signature radius 70 m. Targeting range 100 km. Scan resolution 300 mm. Visual signature: stocky industrial-looking frigate with yellowish-tan and brown hull.

Ship: STRIDE. Class: CORVETTE. Industrial corvette. Largest fuel capacity in the corvette class. Hull integrity 1,450 HP. Cargo capacity 320 m³. Fuel capacity 3,200 units. Mass 7,900,000 kg. Volume 12,000 m³. Inertia modifier 0.56x. Capacitor 40.0 GJ. Max velocity 255 m/s. Warp speed 1.50 kc. Signature radius 50 m. Targeting range 100 km. Scan resolution 500 mm. Visual signature: blocky angular corvette with grey and white hull, industrial details.

Ship: REFLEX. Class: CORVETTE. Fast corvette. Mid-tier velocity, low signature. Light combat profile. Hull integrity 1,250 HP. Cargo capacity 520 m³. Fuel capacity 1,750 units. Mass 9,750,000 kg. Volume 13,000 m³. Inertia modifier 0.34x. Capacitor 50.0 GJ. Max velocity 260 m/s. Warp speed 1.75 kc. Signature radius 50 m. Targeting range 100 km. Scan resolution 500 mm. Visual signature: sleek low-profile corvette with pale grey hull and swept-back design.

Ship: MCF. Class: FRIGATE. Heavy frigate (MCF). Highest fuel capacity in the frigate class. Hull integrity 2,400 HP. Cargo capacity 2,080 m³. Fuel capacity 6,548 units. Mass 52,313,760 kg. Volume 69,600 m³. Inertia modifier 0.20x. Capacitor 40.0 GJ. Max velocity 410 m/s. Warp speed 2.99 kc. Signature radius 70 m. Targeting range 100 km. Scan resolution 295 mm. Visual signature: small frigate with compact angular features.

Ship: CHUMAQ. Class: COMBAT BATTLECRUISER. Combat battlecruiser. Capital-tier mass. ~2.3M m³ volume — assembly-class hull. Hull integrity 6,250 HP. Cargo capacity 312,000 m³. Fuel capacity 270,585 units. Mass 1,739,489,520 kg. Volume 2,315,100 m³. Inertia modifier 0.02x. Capacitor 80.0 GJ. Max velocity n/a m/s. Warp speed n/a kc. Signature radius n/a m. Targeting range n/a km. Scan resolution n/a mm. Visual signature: large combat battlecruiser, bulky elongated white/grey vessel.
